resources.name: Task Orchestrator E2E
resources.description: Run Steps 0-5 in order. Copy processFlowId from Step 1 into the environment variable.

resources.name: Step 0 — Health Check
resources.description:
Verify the app is running.

Expected: {"status": "UP"}

resources.name: Step 1 — Start Flow
resources.description:
Publishes a real TMF-701 processFlow to notification.management.
Full chain: notification.management → pamconsumer → task.command → orchestrator → task-runner.

After running:
  1. COPY processFlowId → paste into environment
  2. Wait 5 seconds (ASYNC action auto-completes via mock signal)
  3. Run Steps 2-5

resources.name: Step 2 — Check Barriers
resources.description:
Expected: 2 rows for your processFlowId
  batch 0: CLOSED, taskTotal=2, taskCompleted=2
  batch 1: CLOSED, taskTotal=1, taskCompleted=1

resources.name: Step 3 — Check Task Executions
resources.description:
Expected: 3 rows, all COMPLETED. Each has a unique taskFlowId.

  taskFlowId=tf-xxxx, actionName=runVoiceDiagnostic, batch=0, downstreamId=ASYNC_xxxx
  taskFlowId=tf-yyyy, actionName=runInternetCheck,   batch=0, downstreamId=null
  taskFlowId=tf-zzzz, actionName=sendNotification,   batch=1, downstreamId=null

For manual signal testing: copy taskFlowId + downstreamId from the WAITING task.

resources.name: Step 4 — Verify ProcessFlow (taskFlowId + href PATCHed)
resources.description:
Confirms every taskFlowId was PATCHed onto the processFlow.

Expected:
  state: completed
  relatedEntity: exactly 3 entries (one per task, no duplicates)
    - tf-xxxx / runInternetCheck (PATCHed on COMPLETED)
    - tf-yyyy / runVoiceDiagnostic (PATCHed on COMPLETED, NOT on WAITING)
    - tf-zzzz / sendNotification (PATCHed on COMPLETED)

Cross-check: tf-ids here must match taskFlowId values in Step 3.

resources.name: Step 5a — Verify Action Codes API (/action-codes)
resources.description:
Returns actionName → actionCode mappings.
Loaded at startup + reloaded every 24h (configurable).

Expected:
  runVoiceDiagnostic → VOICE_SERVICE_DIAGNOSTIC
  runInternetCheck → INTERNET_CHECK
  sendNotification → NOTIFY_USER

resources.name: Step 5b — Verify DCX Action Codes API (/dcx-action-codes) (/action-codes)
resources.description:
Returns actionName → dcxActionCode mappings.

Expected:
  runVoiceDiagnostic → DCX-VSD-01
  runInternetCheck → DCX-INT-04
  sendNotification → DCX-NOT-09

resources.name: POST Inject Signal (complete ASYNC task)
resources.description:
Manually injects a task.signal to complete an ASYNC task in WAITING status.

How to use:
  1. Run POST /demo/start
  2. Run GET /demo/tasks — find the WAITING task
  3. Copy its taskFlowId (e.g. tf-31c94387) and downstreamId (e.g. ASYNC_1e4ec1e0-68a)
  4. Paste them into the environment variables task_flow_id and downstream_txn_id
  5. Run this request

The signal goes to task.command → MockTaskRunner picks it up → publishes COMPLETED → orchestrator advances.

resources.name: GET ProcessFlow State (by ID)
resources.description:
Shows state + relatedEntity list. Verify:
  1. state = completed
  2. relatedEntity has 3 entries (one per task)
  3. Each id/href matches taskFlowId from GET /demo/tasks

resources.name: Action Registry — GET DCX action codes
